nodes.name: runtime-config.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the runtime-config module, verifying that resolveDatabaseTarget correctly reads and merges Paperclip config files, env files, and DATABASE_URL environment variables to produce the correct database connection target.

nodes.name: runtime-config.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves the Paperclip database connection target at runtime by reading config.json and .env files from the filesystem, supporting embedded-postgres and external postgres modes with legacy config migration.

nodes.name: resolveDatabaseTarget
nodes.summary: Main exported function that orchestrates reading the Paperclip config path, env file, and DATABASE_URL to determine and return the final database target (mode, connection string or data dir, and source provenance).

nodes.name: readConfig
nodes.summary: Reads and validates the Paperclip config.json file from disk, migrating legacy config shapes and coercing typed fields like port numbers.

nodes.name: parseEnvFile
nodes.summary: Parses the contents of a .env file into a key-value record, handling quoted values, inline comments, and blank lines.

nodes.name: migrateLegacyConfig
nodes.summary: Transforms older config.json shapes into the current PartialConfig structure, ensuring backward compatibility for users upgrading from earlier Paperclip versions.

nodes.name: activity_log.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for activity_log, which records actor-driven events (create, update, delete) on entities with references to companies, agents, and heartbeat runs.

nodes.name: activity_log
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table storing audit-trail events with actor type/id, action, entity type/id, optional agent and run references, JSONB details, and a company-scoped timestamp index.

nodes.name: agent_api_keys.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for agent_api_keys, storing hashed API keys scoped to agents and companies with revocation timestamps.

nodes.name: agent_api_keys
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table storing hashed API keys for agents with creation, last-use, and revocation timestamps; indexed by key_hash and company+agent composite.

nodes.name: agent_config_revisions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for agent_config_revisions, capturing before/after JSONB snapshots of agent configuration changes with authorship and rollback metadata.

nodes.name: agent_config_revisions
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table tracking versioned config changes for agents with before/after JSONB payloads, changed key lists, source, rollback reference, and author tracking.

nodes.name: agent_runtime_state.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for agent_runtime_state, which stores the live execution state and token/cost counters for each agent keyed by agent_id.

nodes.name: agent_runtime_state
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table with one row per agent storing adapter type, session id, JSONB state, last run status, accumulated token/cost bigint counters, and last error.

nodes.name: agent_task_sessions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for agent_task_sessions, tracking long-lived task sessions per agent and adapter with a unique constraint on company+agent+adapter+task key.

nodes.name: agent_task_sessions
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table for agent task sessions with unique (company, agent, adapter, task_key) constraint, optional session parameters JSONB, last run reference, and error tracking.

nodes.name: agent_wakeup_requests.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for agent_wakeup_requests, modeling the queue of pending agent activation requests with status lifecycle, coalescing, and idempotency key support.

nodes.name: agent_wakeup_requests
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table for agent wakeup queue entries tracking source, trigger, payload JSONB, status (queued/claimed/done), coalesced count, idempotency key, and claimed/finished timestamps.

nodes.name: agents.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for the core agents table, storing agent identity, role, adapter config, runtime config, budget, permissions, and heartbeat timestamps with self-referential hierarchy support.

nodes.name: agents
nodes.summary: Core PostgreSQL table for AI agents with name, role, status, self-referential reports_to hierarchy, adapter type and JSONB config, budget/spend tracking, permissions JSONB, and heartbeat timestamp.

nodes.name: approval_comments.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for approval_comments, linking threaded comments to approvals with author attribution from either agents or human users.

nodes.name: approval_comments
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table for comments on approval requests, with approval_id FK, optional author_agent_id or author_user_id, body text, and approval+created composite index.

nodes.name: approvals.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for approvals, representing human-in-the-loop decision requests raised by agents with status lifecycle, payload JSONB, and decision attribution.

nodes.name: approvals
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table for human-in-the-loop approval requests with type, status (pending/approved/rejected), payload JSONB, requester and decider attribution, and decision note.

nodes.name: assets.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM table definition for assets, tracking uploaded binary objects by provider, object key, content type, byte size, and SHA-256 hash with company-scoped uniqueness.

nodes.name: assets
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table for stored file assets with provider, object_key, content_type, byte_size, sha256, creator attribution, and a unique company+object_key constraint.

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the core authentication tables (users, sessions, accounts, verifications) using Drizzle ORM, forming the foundation of the Better Auth integration in Paperclip.

nodes.name: authUsers
nodes.summary: Core user table (mapped to 'user' in PostgreSQL) storing identity fields — id, name, email, emailVerified, image — with created/updated timestamps. Primary key is a text id.

nodes.name: authSessions
nodes.summary: Session table storing active user sessions with token, IP address, user agent, expiry, and a cascade-delete foreign key to authUsers.

nodes.name: authAccounts
nodes.summary: OAuth/credential account table linking provider accounts to users; stores access/refresh tokens, provider id, and expiry metadata with cascade-delete on user removal.

nodes.name: authVerifications
nodes.summary: Verification token table for email verification and password reset flows; stores identifier, value, and expiry without a direct user foreign key.

nodes.name: board_api_keys.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the board_api_keys table for user-scoped API key management, storing hashed keys with revocation and expiry timestamps and unique hash/user indexes.

nodes.name: boardApiKeys
nodes.summary: API key table with uuid pk, userId FK to authUsers (cascade), hashed key material, and lifecycle timestamps (lastUsedAt, revokedAt, expiresAt). Unique index on keyHash.

nodes.name: budget_incidents.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the budget_incidents table recording threshold violations detected by budget policies, including scope, metric window, observed vs limit amounts, and approval linkage.

nodes.name: budgetIncidents
nodes.summary: Records budget threshold violations per company/policy/scope with window timing, observed vs limit amounts, status (open/dismissed/resolved), and optional approval FK. Partial unique index excludes dismissed incidents.

nodes.name: budget_policies.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the budget_policies table for per-company spend control rules, including scope targeting, metric/window configuration, warn percent, hard stop flag, and active status.

nodes.name: budgetPolicies
nodes.summary: Budget policy table scoped to a company/scope pair, defining a metric (e.g. billed_cents), window kind, amount limit, warn percent, hard stop, and active flag. Unique index enforces one policy per company+scope+metric+window combination.

nodes.name: cli_auth_challenges.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the cli_auth_challenges table managing the CLI device-authorization flow — storing challenge secrets, pending key material, approval state, and references to company, user, and board API key.

nodes.name: cliAuthChallenges
nodes.summary: CLI auth challenge table with secret hash, command, pending key hash/name, optional approval by user and resulting boardApiKey FK, and expiry/cancel timestamps to track the device-auth lifecycle.

nodes.name: companies.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the core companies table — the top-level organizational unit in Paperclip — with status, budget tracking, issue counter, attachment limits, and feedback-sharing consent fields.

nodes.name: companies
nodes.summary: Core organizational unit table with uuid pk, name, status, issue prefix/counter, monthly budget/spend in cents, attachment size limit, agent approval flag, feedback sharing consent, and brand color. Unique index on issuePrefix.

nodes.name: company_logos.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_logos join table linking a company to an asset record for its logo image, with unique constraints enforcing one logo per company and one logo per asset.

nodes.name: companyLogos
nodes.summary: Join table with cascade-delete FKs to companies and assets; unique indexes on companyId and assetId ensure exactly one logo-asset mapping per company.

nodes.name: company_memberships.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_memberships table modeling the many-to-many relationship between companies and principals (users or agents) with role and status, plus composite unique and status indexes.

nodes.name: companyMemberships
nodes.summary: Membership table linking a company to a polymorphic principal (principalType + principalId) with status and membershipRole; unique index prevents duplicate memberships per company/principal pair.

nodes.name: company_secret_bindings.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_secret_bindings table that maps a company secret to a target entity (e.g. an agent or skill) at a specific config path, controlling which secrets are injected where.

nodes.name: companySecretBindings
nodes.summary: Secret binding table with FKs to companies and companySecrets (cascade), polymorphic target (targetType+targetId), configPath, versionSelector, and required flag. Unique index on company+target+configPath prevents duplicate bindings.

nodes.name: company_secret_provider_configs.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_secret_provider_configs table for external secret provider integrations (e.g. Vault, AWS Secrets Manager) per company, including health check state and JSONB config.

nodes.name: companySecretProviderConfigs
nodes.summary: Secret provider config table per company with provider type, display name, status, isDefault flag, JSONB config, health check fields, and optional createdByAgentId FK. Partial unique index enforces one default per company+provider.

nodes.name: company_secret_versions.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_secret_versions table storing versioned secret material with SHA-256 hashes for integrity verification, rotation job tracking, and agent attribution.

nodes.name: companySecretVersions
nodes.summary: Versioned secret material table with FK to companySecrets (cascade), version number, encrypted JSONB material, value and fingerprint SHA-256 hashes, status, rotation job id, and optional agent attribution.

nodes.name: company_secrets.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_secrets table as the canonical secret registry per company, storing key, name, provider type, managed mode, external reference, provider config FK, and version tracking.

nodes.name: companySecrets
nodes.summary: Secret registry table per company with unique key and name, provider type, managed mode (paperclip_managed vs external), optional providerConfigId FK, JSONB provider metadata, latest version number, and rotation/resolution timestamps.

nodes.name: company_skills.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_skills table storing agent skill definitions per company — including markdown content, source locator, trust level, compatibility, and JSONB file inventory.

nodes.name: companySkills
nodes.summary: Skill definition table per company with key (unique), slug, name, markdown content, sourceType/locator/ref for loading, trust level, compatibility status, and JSONB file inventory and metadata.

nodes.name: company_user_sidebar_preferences.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the company_user_sidebar_preferences table persisting per-user, per-company UI sidebar settings such as project order, with a unique constraint per company+user pair.

nodes.name: companyUserSidebarPreferences
nodes.summary: Sidebar preference table with companyId FK (cascade) and text userId, storing a JSONB array of project order. Unique index enforces one row per company+user.

nodes.name: cost_events.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the cost_events table recording fine-grained AI model usage and billing data per agent invocation, linking to company, agent, issue, project, goal, and heartbeat run.

nodes.name: costEvents
nodes.summary: Cost event table capturing LLM token usage (input, cached input, output tokens) and costCents per model call, with FKs to company, agent, issue, project, goal, and heartbeatRun for multi-dimensional cost attribution.

nodes.name: document_revisions.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the document_revisions table storing numbered revisions of agent-authored documents, linking revision bodies and change summaries to the parent document with agent/run attribution.

nodes.name: documentRevisions
nodes.summary: Document revision table with cascade-delete FK to documents, sequential revisionNumber, title, format, full body text, change summary, and attribution to agent/user/heartbeatRun. Unique index on documentId+revisionNumber.

nodes.name: environment_leases.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the environment_leases table tracking active leases on compute environments acquired by execution workspaces or heartbeat runs, including lease policy, provider reference, and cleanup state.

nodes.name: environmentLeases
nodes.summary: Environment lease table with FKs to companies, environments (cascade), executionWorkspaces (set null), issues (set null), and heartbeatRuns (set null), tracking lease status, policy, provider lease id, and cleanup lifecycle.

nodes.name: environments.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the environments table representing compute environment configurations per company (e.g. local, remote Docker), with driver type, status, and JSONB config.

nodes.name: environments
nodes.summary: Environment config table per company with name, description, driver type, status, JSONB config and metadata. Partial unique index ensures only one 'local' driver environment per company.

nodes.name: execution_workspaces.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the execution_workspaces table representing a code workspace (git repo state) used during agent execution — tracking branch, cwd, strategy, provider type, and self-referential derivation lineage.

nodes.name: executionWorkspaces
nodes.summary: Execution workspace table with FKs to companies, projects (cascade), projectWorkspaces (set null), and sourceIssue (set null); stores mode, strategy, cwd, repoUrl, branchName, providerType/ref, and self-referential derivedFrom FK for workspace cloning lineage.

nodes.name: feedback_exports.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the feedback_exports table tracking the export lifecycle of user feedback votes to external labs/telemetry destinations, including payload snapshots, redaction summaries, and versioned schema/bundle identifiers.

nodes.name: feedbackExports
nodes.summary: Feedback export table with FKs to companies, feedbackVotes (cascade), issues (cascade), and projects (set null); tracks export status, destination, consent version, JSONB payload snapshot and redaction summary, and retry count.

nodes.name: feedback_votes.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the feedback_votes table recording user thumbs-up/down votes on agent outputs per issue/target, with consent tracking and a unique constraint preventing duplicate votes per user/target.

nodes.name: feedbackVotes
nodes.summary: Feedback vote table with FKs to companies and issues, polymorphic target (targetType+targetId), authorUserId, vote value, reason, sharedWithLabs flag, consent version, and JSONB redaction summary. Unique on company+target+author.

nodes.name: finance_events.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the finance_events table as the financial ledger for Paperclip, recording debit/credit events with biller, provider, amount in cents, and multi-dimensional FKs to cost events, agents, issues, goals, and heartbeat runs.

nodes.name: financeEvents
nodes.summary: Financial ledger table with FKs to companies, agents, issues, projects, goals, heartbeatRuns, and costEvents; stores eventKind, direction (debit/credit), biller, amountCents, currency, estimated flag, and JSONB metadata.

nodes.name: goals.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the goals table for hierarchical task planning in Paperclip, with self-referential parent FK, level/status fields, and optional owner agent assignment.

nodes.name: goals
nodes.summary: Hierarchical goal table per company with title, description, level (task/project/etc), status (planned/in-progress/done), self-referential parentId FK, and optional ownerAgentId FK to agents.

nodes.name: heartbeat_run_events.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the heartbeat_run_events table as an append-only event stream for agent heartbeat runs, recording typed events with sequence numbers, stream, level, and JSONB payloads using bigserial for high-throughput ids.

nodes.name: heartbeatRunEvents
nodes.summary: High-throughput event log table using bigserial pk, with FKs to companies, heartbeatRuns, and agents; stores seq, eventType, stream/level/color, text message, and JSONB payload for structured agent execution tracing.

nodes.name: heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions.ts
nodes.label: heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions table, recording watchdog evaluation decisions (snooze, escalate, etc.) made per heartbeat run, linking back to the run, issuing issue, and the agent or run that created the decision.

nodes.name: heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions
nodes.label: heartbeat_run_watchdog_decisions
nodes.summary: Records watchdog decisions per heartbeat run (decision text, optional snooze timestamp, reason), linked to company, heartbeat run, optional evaluation issue, and the agent or run that created the record.

nodes.name: heartbeat_runs.ts
nodes.label: heartbeat_runs.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the heartbeat_runs table, capturing the full lifecycle of agent execution runs including status, process metadata, log references, liveness state, retry tracking, and session snapshots.

nodes.name: heartbeat_runs
nodes.label: heartbeat_runs
nodes.summary: Central execution run record for an agent heartbeat: tracks status, process PID, stdout/stderr excerpts, log store reference, liveness state, retry policy, continuation attempts, context snapshot, and wakeup request linkage.

nodes.name: inbox_dismissals.ts
nodes.label: inbox_dismissals.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the inbox_dismissals table, tracking when a user dismisses a specific inbox item key within a company.

nodes.name: inbox_dismissals
nodes.label: inbox_dismissals
nodes.summary: Records per-user, per-company dismissal of inbox items identified by itemKey, with a unique constraint preventing duplicate dismissals.

nodes.name: instance_settings.ts
nodes.label: instance_settings.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the instance_settings table, a singleton configuration record holding general and experimental JSONB settings for the Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: instance_settings
nodes.label: instance_settings
nodes.summary: Singleton table (enforced by unique singletonKey) storing JSONB-typed general and experimental configuration blobs for the running Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: instance_user_roles.ts
nodes.label: instance_user_roles.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the instance_user_roles table, granting instance-level administrative roles (e.g., instance_admin) to specific user IDs.

nodes.name: instance_user_roles
nodes.label: instance_user_roles
nodes.summary: Maps user IDs to instance-scoped roles (default: instance_admin) with a unique constraint per user-role pair.

nodes.name: invites.ts
nodes.label: invites.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the invites table, representing invitation tokens for joining a company with expiry, revocation, and acceptance lifecycle tracking.

nodes.name: invites
nodes.label: invites
nodes.summary: Stores invite tokens (hashed) scoped to a company with type (company_join), allowed join types, expiry, issuer, revocation and acceptance timestamps.

nodes.name: issue_approvals.ts
nodes.label: issue_approvals.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_approvals join table, linking issues to approval records with a composite primary key on issueId and approvalId.

nodes.name: issue_approvals
nodes.label: issue_approvals
nodes.summary: Join table with composite PK (issueId, approvalId) that associates an issue with an approval record, recording which agent or user created the link.

nodes.name: issue_attachments.ts
nodes.label: issue_attachments.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_attachments table, linking file assets to issues and optionally to a specific issue comment.

nodes.name: issue_attachments
nodes.label: issue_attachments
nodes.summary: Associates uploaded assets (assetId) with an issue and optional comment, with a unique constraint ensuring each asset is attached only once.

nodes.name: issue_comments.ts
nodes.label: issue_comments.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_comments table, storing comments on issues with author attribution (agent or user), run linkage, body text, and rich presentation/metadata JSONB fields.

nodes.name: issue_comments
nodes.label: issue_comments
nodes.summary: Stores issue comments with body text, authorAgentId or authorUserId, optional heartbeat run link, and typed JSONB presentation/metadata fields; includes GIN trigram index on body for full-text search.

nodes.name: issue_documents.ts
nodes.label: issue_documents.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_documents join table, associating documents with issues via a keyed reference, enforcing uniqueness of the key per issue and one-to-one between document and issue.

nodes.name: issue_documents
nodes.label: issue_documents
nodes.summary: Links a document to an issue with a named key; unique constraints enforce one document per issue-key combination and ensure each document belongs to only one issue.

nodes.name: issue_execution_decisions.ts
nodes.label: issue_execution_decisions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_execution_decisions table, recording stage-level execution outcomes (approve, reject, etc.) made by agents or users during issue processing.

nodes.name: issue_execution_decisions
nodes.label: issue_execution_decisions
nodes.summary: Captures per-stage execution decisions on an issue (stageId, stageType, outcome, body), attributed to an agent or user and optionally linked to the creating heartbeat run.

nodes.name: issue_inbox_archives.ts
nodes.label: issue_inbox_archives.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_inbox_archives table, tracking per-user archival of issues from their inbox with a unique constraint preventing duplicate archives.

nodes.name: issue_inbox_archives
nodes.label: issue_inbox_archives
nodes.summary: Records when a user archives an issue from their inbox (userId, issueId, archivedAt), with a unique constraint per company-issue-user triplet.

nodes.name: issue_labels.ts
nodes.label: issue_labels.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_labels many-to-many join table, associating label records with issues using a composite primary key.

nodes.name: issue_labels
nodes.label: issue_labels
nodes.summary: Many-to-many join table between issues and labels (composite PK on issueId+labelId) scoped to a company, with cascade deletes on both sides.

nodes.name: issue_read_states.ts
nodes.label: issue_read_states.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_read_states table, recording the last time each user read each issue to power unread-state indicators.

nodes.name: issue_read_states
nodes.label: issue_read_states
nodes.summary: Tracks lastReadAt timestamp per user per issue per company; unique constraint on (companyId, issueId, userId) enables upsert-based read-state management.

nodes.name: issue_recovery_actions.ts
nodes.label: issue_recovery_actions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_recovery_actions table, modeling automated recovery workflows triggered on stalled or failed issues, including ownership, cause fingerprinting, retry policy, and escalation linkage.

nodes.name: issue_recovery_actions
nodes.label: issue_recovery_actions
nodes.summary: Tracks automated recovery attempts for a source issue (kind, cause, fingerprint, status, attemptCount, maxAttempts), with optional escalation to a recovery issue and partial unique indexes ensuring one active recovery per issue and per cause fingerprint.

nodes.name: issue_reference_mentions.ts
nodes.label: issue_reference_mentions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_reference_mentions table, capturing cross-issue mentions found in titles, descriptions, comments, or documents with deduplication constraints.

nodes.name: issue_reference_mentions
nodes.label: issue_reference_mentions
nodes.summary: Records mention relationships between issues (sourceIssueId → targetIssueId) with sourceKind (title/description/comment/document), sourceRecordId, and conditional unique indexes to prevent duplicate mention records.

nodes.name: issue_relations.ts
nodes.label: issue_relations.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_relations table, modeling directed typed relationships (currently "blocks") between pairs of issues within a company.

nodes.name: issue_relations
nodes.label: issue_relations
nodes.summary: Stores typed directed edges between issues (currently only type='blocks'), with a unique constraint on the (companyId, issueId, relatedIssueId, type) quadruplet.

nodes.name: issue_thread_interactions.ts
nodes.label: issue_thread_interactions.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_thread_interactions table, tracking structured interaction events on an issue thread (questions, approvals, etc.) with typed payload/result JSONB, continuation policy, and idempotency support.

nodes.name: issue_thread_interactions
nodes.label: issue_thread_interactions
nodes.summary: Models structured interactions on an issue thread (kind, status, continuationPolicy, idempotencyKey) with typed IssueThreadInteractionPayload/Result JSONB, resolution tracking, and links to source comment and heartbeat run.

nodes.name: issue_tree_hold_members.ts
nodes.label: issue_tree_hold_members.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_tree_hold_members table, capturing a snapshot of issues included in an issue tree hold with their depth, status, assignment, and active run at the time of hold creation.

nodes.name: issue_tree_hold_members
nodes.label: issue_tree_hold_members
nodes.summary: Snapshot record of an issue within a hold (holdId FK), storing depth, issueStatus, assigneeAgentId, activeRunId, and skipped flag; unique on (holdId, issueId).

nodes.name: issue_tree_holds.ts
nodes.label: issue_tree_holds.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_tree_holds table, representing a temporary hold placed on an entire issue subtree to pause agent execution, with release tracking and policies.

nodes.name: issue_tree_holds
nodes.label: issue_tree_holds
nodes.summary: Represents a hold on a root issue's subtree (mode, status, releasePolicy JSONB), recording who created and released the hold (agent/user/run) and the associated release reason and metadata.

nodes.name: issue_work_products.ts
nodes.label: issue_work_products.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the issue_work_products table, tracking external artifacts (PRs, deployments, etc.) produced by agents while working on an issue, with provider/externalId linkage and health status.

nodes.name: issue_work_products
nodes.label: issue_work_products
nodes.summary: Tracks work products (type, provider, externalId, url, status, reviewState, isPrimary, healthStatus) produced for an issue, linked to execution workspace, runtime service, and the creating heartbeat run.

nodes.name: issues.ts
nodes.label: issues.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the central issues table, the core entity of the Paperclip platform representing a unit of agent-executable work with status, priority, assignment, execution run linkage, monitor scheduling, and numerous GIN/composite indexes for search and query performance.

nodes.name: issues
nodes.label: issues
nodes.summary: Core issue entity with 40+ columns: status/priority/workMode, agent and user assignment, checkout/execution run IDs, monitor scheduling fields, execution workspace linkage, origin tracing, requestDepth, JSONB execution policy/state, and GIN trigram indexes on title, identifier, and description for full-text search.

nodes.name: join_requests.ts
nodes.label: join_requests.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the join_requests table, handling both human user and agent onboarding flows via invite link, including claim secret lifecycle and approval/rejection tracking.

nodes.name: join_requests
nodes.label: join_requests
nodes.summary: Records company join requests tied to an invite (inviteId), with requestType (human/agent), status, claim secret hash and expiry, agent defaults payload, and approval/rejection timestamps; partial unique indexes prevent duplicate pending requests per user or email.

nodes.name: labels.ts
nodes.label: labels.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema for the labels table, storing company-scoped label definitions with name and color for tagging issues.

nodes.name: labels
nodes.label: labels
nodes.summary: Company-scoped label definitions (name, color) with a unique constraint on (companyId, name) ensuring label names are unique within each company.

nodes.name: plugin_company_settings.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_company_settings` Drizzle table, which stores per-company overrides for plugin enablement and settings JSON, with a unique constraint per (company, plugin) pair.

nodes.name: plugin_config.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_config` Drizzle table for storing instance-wide plugin configuration, distinct from per-company settings.

nodes.name: plugin_database.ts
nodes.summary: Defines two Drizzle tables — `plugin_database_namespaces` (isolated DB schema per plugin) and `plugin_migrations` (per-plugin migration ledger with checksum verification) — supporting the plugin database isolation subsystem.

nodes.name: plugin_entities.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_entities` Drizzle table for storing typed entity objects owned by plugins, scoped to a plugin and namespace with a JSON data payload.

nodes.name: plugin_jobs.ts
nodes.summary: Defines two Drizzle tables — `plugin_jobs` (scheduled job registration with cron expressions) and `plugin_job_runs` (immutable execution history per job run) — for the plugin job scheduling subsystem.

nodes.name: plugin_logs.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_logs` Drizzle table for persisting structured log entries emitted by plugin workers, keyed by plugin and scope.

nodes.name: plugin_managed_resources.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_managed_resources` Drizzle table for tracking external resources (e.g. OAuth connections, cloud assets) provisioned and managed by plugins.

nodes.name: plugin_state.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_state` Drizzle table providing scoped key-value storage for plugin workers across multiple scope kinds (instance, company, project, agent, issue, etc.), with a nulls-not-distinct unique constraint requiring PostgreSQL 15+.

nodes.name: plugin_webhooks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `plugin_webhook_deliveries` Drizzle table for recording inbound webhook delivery attempts to plugins, including status, payload, and response details.

nodes.name: plugins.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the root `plugins` Drizzle table storing one row per installed plugin, including the full manifest JSON, version, status, and install order; serves as the foreign key parent for all plugin subsystem tables.

nodes.name: principal_permission_grants.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `principal_permission_grants` Drizzle table for recording explicit permission grants assigned to principals (users or agents) within a company, supporting fine-grained authorization.

nodes.name: project_goals.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `project_goals` Drizzle join table linking projects to goals, enabling many-to-many associations between projects and strategic goals.

nodes.name: project_workspaces.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `project_workspaces` Drizzle table representing code workspace configurations (local path, git repo, or remote) attached to a project, with metadata for source type, repo URL/ref, and remote provider details.

nodes.name: projects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `projects` Drizzle table representing AI agent project groupings within a company, scoped to a goal and optionally assigned a lead agent.

nodes.name: secret_access_events.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `secret_access_events` Drizzle table for auditing every access to company secrets, capturing the accessor identity, secret reference, and access outcome.

nodes.name: user_sidebar_preferences.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the minimal `user_sidebar_preferences` Drizzle table for persisting per-user UI sidebar state, keyed by user ID.

nodes.name: workspace_operations.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the `workspace_operations` Drizzle table tracking individual shell commands and operations executed within agent execution workspaces, including log references and exit codes.

nodes.name: workspace_runtime_services.ts

nodes.name: summarizeToolResult
nodes.summary: Condenses a tool call's result string into a compact representation, handling structured output metadata and truncating long outputs.

nodes.summary: Implements a topological sort algorithm for workflow issues, ordering them by blocker dependencies with a chronological tie-breaking strategy.

nodes.name: workflowSort
nodes.summary: Performs a topological sort on an array of issues using their blocker relationships and creation timestamps, returning issues in dependency order.

nodes.summary: Reads worktree-specific branding metadata (colors) from HTML meta tags, computing accessible text colors via luminance calculations for custom worktree UI themes.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses WCAG relative luminance formula to pick between black and white text based on background hex color.

nodes.name: getWorktreeUiBranding
nodes.summary: Reads branding colors from document meta tags and returns a normalized branding object with background colors and computed readable text colors.

nodes.name: zip.test.ts
nodes.summary: Extensive test suite for the zip module, testing round-trip archive creation and reading, CRC32 computation, directory entries, and binary file handling.

nodes.name: zip.ts
nodes.summary: Full in-browser ZIP archive implementation supporting creation and reading of deflate-compressed archives, with base64 portable file entry serialization.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure TypeScript implementation of the ZIP format without external dependencies, using Web Streams API for decompression and manual binary struct manipulation.

nodes.name: readZipArchive
nodes.summary: Parses a ZIP archive from a Uint8Array, extracting file entries with paths and decompressed content, returning a structured archive object.

nodes.name: createZipArchive
nodes.summary: Creates a deflate-compressed ZIP archive from a dictionary of file paths to portable file entries, writing local and central directory headers.
